    Standard_ASTM_D3230
    Salt Content in Crude Oil - ASTM D3230 (input-driven conversion).
    Standard_ASTM_D4052
    ASTM D4052 / ISO 12185 - Standard Test Method for Density, Relative Density, and API Gravity of Liquids.

    ASTM D4294 / ISO 8754 - Standard Test Method for Sulfur in Petroleum Products.
    Standard_ASTM_D445
    ASTM D445 - Standard Test Method for Kinematic Viscosity of Transparent and Opaque Liquids.
    Standard_ASTM_D4737
    Calculated Cetane Index - ASTM D4737 (four-variable) with ASTM D976 (two-variable) cross-check.
    Standard_ASTM_D611
    Estimated Aniline Point - ASTM D611 (screening correlation).
    Standard_ASTM_D6377
    Standard_ASTM_D6377 class.
    Standard_ASTM_D6377.RvpMethod
    Enumeration of the supported Reid Vapor Pressure (RVP) / vapor-pressure correlation methods.
    Standard_ASTM_D6377.RvpResult
    Immutable structured result of an RVP calculation.
    Standard_ASTM_D86
    ASTM D86 - Standard Test Method for Distillation of Petroleum Products and Liquid Fuels at Atmospheric Pressure.
    Standard_ASTM_D86.D86Basis
    Reporting basis for the recovered (distilled) fraction of an ASTM D86 curve.
    Standard_ASTM_D97
    ASTM D97 - Standard Test Method for Pour Point of Petroleum Products.
    Standard_BSW
    BS&W - Basic Sediment and Water determination for crude oil.
    Standard_EN116
    Estimated Cold Filter Plugging Point (CFPP) - EN 116 (screening correlation).
    Standard_TVP
    True Vapor Pressure (TVP) - API MPMS Chapter 19 / GPA TP-15.
